title: Atzlk MC: Official Modpack Plus+
description: Additional Modrinth Modpack for mc.atzlk.com 1.21.1 NeoForge ProtoManly's Weather Mod SMP w/ Extra Mods
body:
**⚠️ WARNING: Do not update Sodium! The latest version cause ProtoManly's Weather Mod to crash! ⚠️**

# Official Plus+ Modpack for Atzlk MC / mc.atzlk.com
This modpack contains all the required and recommended mods for playing on mc.atzlk.com, a minecraft server w/ ProtoManly's Weather Mod added which adds tornadoes, hurricanes, storms, seasons and more to the game! + A few extra mods that make the gameplay experience better!

Main featured mods in this Modpack: ProtoManly's Weather Mod, Modified Tornado Damage for PMWeather, PMW Extra!, EAS Addon for ProtoManly's Weather Mod, Elton's Wind meter for PMWeather, Natrual Regrowth for ProtoManly's Weather, Farmers Delight, Simple Voice Chat, JEI, Mouse Tweaks, Vivecraft, Customizable Player Models, Enchantment Descriptions, Ambient Sounds, Distant Horizions & Sodium + Optimizations
